articles.description: Bitcoin’s past cycles peaked in November or December, with peaks on Nov. 10, 2021, at $69,000; Dec. 17, 2017, at $19,891; and Nov. 29, 2013, at $1,242, according to analyst @apsk32, an engineer focused-on Bitcoin data visualization. The data indicates that if historical trends persist, the four-year cycle pattern may signal a peak in November […] The post Bitcoin Power Law suggests November...
